title: Nilave Naanum Lyrics Yuvan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Naresh Iyer, Padmapriya
Lyrics: Vivega
Song: Nilave Naanum
Movie: Yuvan
Music by : Joshua Sridhar

Sari edhu, ingu thavaredhu
Ingu puriya koodumo
Ilamaye dhinam kulapudhe
idhu enna maayamo

Nilave Naanum neethaana ?
Dhinamum valiyil thaeivena..
Pogum paadhai sarithaana
Pen udal enraal oru mayakkam

Vayadhe uyirai vaangathe
Arumbu paruvam thaangaathe
Ninaivin sumaigal o-yaadhe
En manadhellam oru kulappam

Dhinam kodi aasai mulaikudhe
Oru dhinusaai ennaku valikudhe
En peyare yenno marakudhe
Thadumaatrame..

Moondre nodiyil pournami
Oru moonram pirayaai ilaithadhe
Koodadhenru moolai solla
Vayadhe ketkaamal adhaye seiyum

Nilave Naanum neethaana ?
Dhinamum valiyil thaeivena..
Pogum paadhai sarithaana
Pen udal enraal oru mayakkam

Vayadhe uyirai vaangathe
Arumbu paruvam thaangaathe
Ninaivin sumaigal o-yaadhe
En manadhellam oru kulappam

Edhayum edhayum arindhu paarthuvida
Idhayam aasayil yaenguthe
Avalai paarthadhum arivu odi poi
porvai pothi thoongudhe

Vaazhai pola minnum vizhiyum
avvan idhai kaattum kanna kuliyum
Uyir parakka parakka thavika thavika
rasikiren inikum kaayame ..( Nilave Naanum neethaana...)

Yedhire theriyum vaanavil athanai
Viralgal theenda kooduma
Thaeneer koppaiyil udhadu modhuvadhu
Mutham endru aaguma
Paaravayaale aval alaika
en paruva naanangal vizhika

Oru nodiyil nodiyil udaindhu naanum vilukiren
uyirin imisaye...

Nilave Naanum neethaana .....
Dhinamum valiyil thaeivena..
Pogum paadhai sarithaana
Pen udal enraal oru mayakkam

Vayadhe uyirai vaangathe
Arumbu paruvam thaangaathe
Ninaivin sumaigal o-yaadhe
En manadhellam oru kulappam

Dhinam kodi aasai mulaikudhe
Oru dhinusaai ennaku valikudhe
En peyare yenno marakudhe
Thadumaatrame..

Moondre nodiyil pournami
Oru moonram pirayaai ilaithadhe
Koodadhenru moolai solla
Vayadhe ketkaamal adhaye seiyum (Nilave Naanum neethaana..)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Nilave Naanum?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, exploring the beauty of romantic connections.

What is the plot context of the movie Yuvan?

The movie revolves around themes of love and relationships, making this song a pivotal moment in the narrative.

Who are the singers of Nilave Naanum?

The song features the talented voices of Naresh Iyer and Padmapriya.

Who composed the music for Yuvan?

The music for the movie was composed by Joshua Sridhar, known for his melodious tunes.

When was Nilave Naanum released?

The song was released on August 15, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nilave Naanum, the characters express their deep feelings for each other through a captivating melody that resonates with the audience. The song's soothing composition by Joshua Sridhar, combined with Viveka's poignant lyrics, creates an atmosphere of romance and nostalgia. It beautifully encapsulates the essence of love, making it a perfect fit for weddings and anniversaries. The heartfelt performances by Naresh Iyer and Padmapriya elevate the emotional depth of the song, leaving listeners enchanted.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nilave Naanum from the movie Yuvan is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Naresh Iyer and Padmapriya, this song is a perfect blend of soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics. Experience the magic of Joshua Sridhar's composition that resonates with every romantic soul.
stanzaMeanings: What is right, what is wrong here? Can this be understood here? Every day is a puzzle, what kind of magic is this?
Is the moon also me? Am I lost on this path every day? If my body goes, is it a dream?
Do not take life away from the stomach. Do not bear the burden of youth. The memories are not to be forgotten. My heart is a mess.
Every day, desires are sprouting. One day, I will be born. My name is something I cannot forget. Just a disturbance...
In the third hour of the night, the full moon does not shine. Saying not to gather, without listening to the roots, it will do the same.
Is the moon also me? Am I lost on this path every day? If my body goes, is it a dream?
Do not take life away from the stomach. Do not bear the burden of youth. The memories are not to be forgotten. My heart is a mess.
Look at everything and understand. The heart is longing. Seeing her, the knowledge fades away, and the vision sleeps.
Like a banana, her shining eyes show this. The eyes are like a pool. I am enjoying life, struggling, and today I am alive... (Is the moon also me...)
In the sky, I know everything. Can the fingers reach that? In the honey pot, will the sweetness become a kiss? With a breeze, she calls my seasons to shine.
In a moment, I will shine too, with the essence of life...
Is the moon also me? Am I lost on this path every day? If my body goes, is it a dream?
Do not take life away from the stomach. Do not bear the burden of youth. The memories are not to be forgotten. My heart is a mess.
Every day, desires are sprouting. One day, I will be born. My name is something I cannot forget. Just a disturbance...
In the third hour of the night, the full moon does not shine. Saying not to gather, without listening to the roots, it will do the same. (Is the moon also me...)
